headline: GE Vernova Joins S&P 100 As AI Power Demand Draws Focus
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) has been added to the S&P 100 index, marking its inclusion among some of the largest U.S. companies. The change highlights GE Vernova's role in power and grid infrastructure linked to AI and data center energy demand. The index addition may influence index-linked funds and ETFs that track the S&P 100. GE Vernova focuses on power generation and grid technologies that sit at the center of the energy systems needed to run AI and high density data centers. The company now...

headline: Here Are Monday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Brown-Forman, Cava Group, Dow, GE Vernova, Global Payments, Netflix, Shake Shack,  Starbucks, Verizon, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower once again on Monday, following a horrible week on Wall Street. With all of Wall Street looking for a solid non-farm payrolls report of 65,000 jobs added, it came in at a very disappointing 92,000 jobs lost, and the unemployment rate bumped up to 4.4%.
